name: Gene
description_en: Gene is a creature, who was faced by the Bandle Gunners. He was trying to get to Bandle City. Lulu later turned him into his smaller self.
description_fr: Gene est une créature qui a été affrontée par les Bandle Gunners. Il essayait de se rendre à Bandle City. Lulu l'a ensuite transformé en lui-même.
